page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance belonging to the ecs.gn5i server family. It is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities, specifically leveraging dedicated graphics processing units alongside a balanced allocation of system memory and central processing resources.

The hardware configuration features 32 dedicated x86_64 physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 32 vCPUs without hyperthreading. System memory is provisioned at 128.0 GB, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is delivered by two NVIDIA P4 GPUs, providing a combined total of 16 GB of VRAM. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor, includes a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps, and does not feature any local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a balanced ratio of memory to compute, but the lack of local storage requires architectural planning for data-intensive tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. The inclusion of dual NVIDIA P4 GPUs provides a cost-effective entry point for legacy GPU acceleration compared to newer, more expensive accelerator architectures.

This server type is suitable for workloads such as low-latency AI inference, video transcoding, image processing, and lightweight machine learning model training. It also fits general-purpose GPU-accelerated applications and parallel computing tasks that do not require high-speed local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance from the ecs.gn5i family, designed for parallel computing workloads. It features 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory. Graphics acceleration is provided by two NVIDIA P4 GPUs with a total of 16 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. It does not include local storage, necessitating network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for legacy GPU workloads, offering dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It is suited for applications such as AI inference, video transcoding, image processing, and parallel computing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA P4 GPUs with 16 GB total VRAM for parallel computing workloads.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated processing cores and dual graphics processors for parallel computing and media transcoding workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio
Dual NVIDIA P4 GPUs providing 16 GB of total VRAM
128.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
Best suited for AI inference, video transcoding, and parallel processing
